trim.if: and (p.title like concat('%',#{key_word},'%') or p.content like concat ('%',#{key_word},'%'))

mapper.update:
update lkt_bbs_post set recycle = 1 where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_bbs_post p LEFT JOIN lkt_bbs_forum f ON f.id = p.forum_id LEFT JOIN lkt_bbs_video v ON v.file_id = p.video_id

SELECT p.content, DATE_FORMAT( p.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AS create_time, p.id, p.`status`, p.is_home_recommend, p.title, p.user_id, u.user_name, p.type, p.video_id, p.images, p.cover_img, p.text FROM lkt_bbs_post p INNER JOIN lkt_user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id where p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.collect_num, p.comment_num, p.content, DATE_FORMAT( p.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AS create_time, p.id, p.like_num, p.title, p.user_id, u.user_name, f.head_img AS headimgurl, p.pro_ids, p.video_id, p.forward_num, p.type, p.images, p.forum_id, p.cover_img, p.status, p.text, p.category_id FROM lkt_bbs_post p LEFT JOIN lkt_user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN lkt_bbs_forum f ON f.id = p.forum_id where p.id = #{id}

SELECT SUM(like_num) AS like_num,SUM(collect_num) AS collect_num FROM lkt_bbs_post WHERE id IN
#{id}
